description: Create a chapter divider slide for an appendix methodology and supplemental data section, with a large headline, survey kicker, and supporting methodology text over a split-layout image background.

header.kicker: SECOND ANNUAL EY/IIF GLOBAL INSURANCE RISK MANAGEMENT SURVEY
header.headline: Appendix: methodology and supplemental data
header.sub: The global EY organization, in collaboration with the IIF, surveyed CROs and other senior risk executives from 86 IIF member firms and other insurance companies in EMEIA, the Americas and Asia-Pacific between October 2024 and January 2025. Participants were interviewed, completed an online survey or both. The research included a cross-section of the insurance sector in terms of asset size, geographic reach and line of business (e.g., P&C, life, health, reinsurance and specialty).
